verses.text: Joshua, old, gathers Israel for his farewell. Farewell. He speaks his last counsel.
Joshua, old, gathers Israel for his farewell. Farewell. He speaks his last counsel.
God fought for them and will drive out the rest. God fought. The victory was His.
God fought for them and will drive out the rest. God fought. The victory was His.
God fought for them and will drive out the rest. God fought. The victory was His.
Be courageous to keep the law; cleave to the LORD. Cleave. Hold fast to God.
Be courageous to keep the law; cleave to the LORD. Cleave. Hold fast to God.
Be courageous to keep the law; cleave to the LORD. Cleave. Hold fast to God.
One man chases a thousand, for God fights for you; love Him. Love Him. Take heed to love God.
One man chases a thousand, for God fights for you; love Him. Love Him. Take heed to love God.
One man chases a thousand, for God fights for you; love Him. Love Him. Take heed to love God.
If you cleave to the nations, they will be snares to you. Beware. Compromise brings ruin.
If you cleave to the nations, they will be snares to you. Beware. Compromise brings ruin.
'Not one thing hath failed'; but disobedience brings the curse. Faithful God. He keeps both promise and warning.
'Not one thing hath failed'; but disobedience brings the curse. Faithful God. He keeps both promise and warning.
'Not one thing hath failed'; but disobedience brings the curse. Faithful God. He keeps both promise and warning.
